scripts.check:firebase-build: npm run build:firebase && node -e "const h=require('fs').readFileSync('dist/index.html','utf8'); if (/\"\/company-estudi\//.test(h)) process.exit(1); if (!/src=\"\/assets\//.test(h)) process.exit(1); console.log('Rutes de Firebase correctes: /assets/...')"
scripts.test:firebase-emulators: VITE_USE_FIREBASE_EMULATORS=true VITE_RUN_FIREBASE_EMULATOR_TESTS=true VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY=fake-api-key VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=localhost VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=company-estudi VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID=1:123:web:qa vitest run --no-file-parallelism src/services/studyRoomEmulator.test.js src/services/firestoreRulesEmulator.test.js
scripts.test:emulators: npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --only auth,firestore "npm run test:firebase-emulators"
